layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind default scale (generous spacing preferred, e.g., p-8 or p-12 for containers)
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl (12px) for main cards, rounded-lg (8px) for inputs and buttons
layout_and_spacing.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B0F14]/70 border-b border-white/5 for sticky headers and navigation
layout_and_spacing.admin_dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense 'Control Room' style layout.

components.buttons: Flat backgrounds for primary (#10B981), subtle hover states (brightness increase), 1px solid border for secondary buttons (border-white/10) with text-white hover.
components.inputs: bg-[#121821] border-white/10 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#10B981]/50 focus:border-[#10B981] text-white placeholder:text-muted-foreground
components.cards: bg-[#121821] border border-white/5 rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(16,185,129,0.03)] hover:shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(16,185,129,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
components.chat_bubbles: Sent: bg-[#10B981] text-[#0B0F14] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm. Received: bg-[#1E293B] text-[#F8FAFC] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm.
components.badges: Font-mono text-xs uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle brightness adjustments, border color changes. e.g., hover:border-[#10B981]/50
motion_and_interactions.chat_messages: Staggered fade-up entry animations for new messages (framer-motion).

icons.instructions: Use for all UI elements. Ensure stroke width is consistent (typically 2px). Use filled variants only when active.

images.description: Abstract dark cybersecurity background with emerald green data nodes
Minimalist abstract dark tech pattern for admin dashboard header

instructions_to_main_agent: Add Google Fonts for 'Outfit', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' in index.html or layout wrapper.
Apply the base colors to Tailwind config strictly as defined. Do NOT use pure black (#000000); use the provided #0B0F14.
For the Login page: use the 'login_background' image with an overlay of `bg-[#0B0F14]/80` and `backdrop-blur-sm` for the login card container.
Chat Window: Use the defined chat_bubbles rules. The encryption status indicator should be a small pill badge using JetBrains Mono with a glowing green dot.
Admin Dashboard: Implement a tight bento-grid layout for metrics. Failed logins should use the destructive color (#EF4444) for alerts.
All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, inputs, and forms, but strip their default borders/colors and apply the custom styling defined above (border-white/5, bg-[#121821]).
